title: Language update notifications
scenario: Language update notification does not appear when app is backgrounded during firmware update on Device Settings > Language screen
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair and connect a supported Poly Bluetooth headset to the Android device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Language.
4. Select a supported language from the list.
6. Observe the popup window that appears, followed by the "Software update - Three easy steps" screen with animation.
7. While the update is in progress, press the Home button or switch to another app to put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
8. Check the Android notification shade for a notification from the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: A notification should appear in the Android notification shade stating "device update is in progress" while the update is ongoing. After the update completes successfully, a notification should appear stating that the device is updated.
